title: Keto Russian Crispy Savory Bites
description: A crispy keto snack with a savory twist, these bite-sized morsels are easy to make and delicious to eat.

ingredients.name: Russian salad (made with olive oil, vinegar, mustard, and mayonnaise)
Savory cheese (such as cheddar or parmesan)
Fry oil (such as avocado oil or coconut oil)

instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
Wash and dry the lettuce leaves. Set aside.
In a bowl, mix together the Russian salad, savory cheese, and stir-fry sauce.
Using the lettuce leaves as wrappers, fill each leaf with about 1 tablespoon of the salad mixture.
Carefully place the filled lettuce leaves in the hot oil and fry until crispy and golden brown.
Remove the crispy bites from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
